browser.tooltip: Zen Browser — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

helium.tooltip: Helium Browser — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close
helium.launch_shell: command -v helium-browser >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec helium-browser; command -v helium >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec helium; notify-send "Dock" "helium-browser not found"
helium.launch_new_shell: command -v helium-browser >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec helium-browser --new-window; command -v helium >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec helium --new-window; notify-send "Dock" "helium-browser not found"

pear.tooltip: Pear Desktop — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

floorp.tooltip: Floorp — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

cursor.tooltip: Cursor — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

vscode.tooltip: VS Code Insiders — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

zed.tooltip: Zed — click: focus/launch, middle: new workspace, right: close

kitty.tooltip: Kitty — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

terminal.tooltip: Terminal — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close
terminal.launch_shell: command -v ghostty >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec ghostty; command -v kitty >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec kitty; command -v foot >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec foot; exec konsole
terminal.launch_new_shell: command -v ghostty >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec ghostty; command -v kitty >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec kitty; command -v foot >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec foot; command -v konsole >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec konsole; exec konsole

files.tooltip: File manager — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close
files.launch_shell: command -v dolphin >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec dolphin; command -v thunar >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec thunar; exec nautilus
files.launch_new_shell: command -v dolphin >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec dolphin --new-window; command -v thunar >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec thunar; command -v nautilus >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec nautilus --new-window; exec nautilus

krita.tooltip: Krita — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

steam.tooltip: Steam — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

heroic.tooltip: Heroic Games Launcher — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close

lutris.tooltip: Lutris — click: focus/launch, middle: new window, right: close
